# HydraNova Labs

> Precision tissue culture company delivering pathogen-free, genetically stable Generation Zero plants at industrial scale.

## About

HydraNova Labs uses automated tissue culture technology to produce monoclonal, disease-free plants year-round. Every plant is genetically identical to a single verified source, eliminating epigenetic drift, pathogen carryover, and seasonal dependency. The platform scales from thousands to millions of plants from one source plant.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hydranovalabs.com): Main site — company overview, problem/solution, technology, team, and contact
- [Privacy Policy](https://hydranovalabs.com/privacy.html): Data collection, cookies, GDPR/CCPA compliance

## Key Details

- **Industry**: Agricultural biotechnology / tissue culture
- **Product**: Generation Zero plants — lab-verified, pathogen-free, genetically stable
- **Technology**: Automated precision tissue culture in controlled sterile environments
- **Differentiators**: Monoclonal production, modular scalability, year-round output, zero pathogen carryover
- **Contact**: grow@hydranovalabs.com
- **Phone**: 214-225-0544
